title: Create Iceberg table as SELECT SEGV
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal('/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/f0/', 'CSV') AS (SELECT 1 OFFSET 1 ROW); --SEGV
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INT, c2 TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c1 > 1;
CREATE TABLE t3 (c3 FLOAT8, c4 INT);
INSERT INTO t3 VALUES (1.5, NULL), (2.5, 3), (3.5, NULL);
key_bug_features: CREATE TABLE with SELECT and OFFSET causes segmentation fault
